summary: Frontend-only testing of 4 new dedicated SEO pages (CDG, Orly, Beauvais, Paris Train Station) with 3 languages (FR/EN/RU) and booking system. All features tested successfully.

urls_tested: /cdg-airport-transfer - CDG Airport Transfer page loads with correct title and all elements
/orly-airport-transfer - Orly Airport Transfer page loads correctly
/beauvais-airport-transfer - Beauvais Airport Transfer page loads correctly
/paris-train-station-transfer - Paris Train Station page loads correctly
new_page_loading_english_urls.details: All 4 new pages load with city-transfer-page testid, hero-title, 4 vehicle cards, booking form, and popular routes

existing_paris_airport_transfer.details: Paris Airport Transfer page still works - uses ParisAirportTransfer component (different from CityTransferPage)

details: BOOK NOW/RESERVER button on vehicle cards scrolls to booking form (URL unchanged)
Page scroll position changed from 0 to 3242 after clicking
Does NOT navigate away - stays on same page
Banner NOT visible before clicking vehicle
Banner VISIBLE after clicking BOOK NOW button
Shows vehicle name, passengers, luggage, and price
Form has pre-filled pickup (e.g., 'Paris CDG Airport (Terminal 2)')
All fields (pickup, dropoff, date, time) can be filled

countries_page_new_entries.details: All new Paris entries appear under France section, Paris entry still exists

languages_tested: Content changes on all new pages

navigation_from_countries.details: Clicking CDG card on Countries page navigates to /cdg-airport-transfer

seed_data_creation: None - all data is hardcoded in frontend
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new SEO pages (CDG, Orly, Beauvais, Paris Train Station) tested successfully with FR/EN/RU support. Key behaviors verified: vehicle RESERVER button scrolls to form (not navigates), selected vehicle banner appears, form submission goes to /car-selection, Countries page shows all new entries under France. ParisAirportTransfer is a separate component from CityTransferPage.

features_list: Paris Train Station page EN/FR URLs
